title: German-Style Chicken Skewers
description: A classic German-inspired dish featuring marinated chicken skewers, grilled to perfection. Serve with a side of crisp veggies or a fresh salad.

ingredients.name: skewers
ingredients.amount: 10-12 wooden skewers, soaked in water for 30 minutes

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together jerk seasoning, olive oil, lemon juice, and garlic powder. Add chicken and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread chicken, bacon, and onion onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
Let skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
